results.title: Mexico president Sheinbaum gifts her World Cup ticket to Indigenous athlete
results.description: Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum has given away her ticket to the World Cup opening match. The first female president in Mexico’s history donated her ticket to Yolett Cervantes Cuaquehua, a young indigenous woman from Veracruz. Cervantes Cuaquehua was chosen for...

results.title: US liquor producer relocates to Canada amid trade tensions
results.description: Stephanie Intrevado has built quite an unusual collection over the years. Ever since taking her first sip of Sour Puss at the age of 18 — the legal drinking age in her home province of Quebec — she has been determined to try every flavor of the brightly colored fruit liqueur, AzerNEWS reports, citing BBC.

results.title: Lee: Jacob's Pillow exhibit opening at library
results.description: A new public history exhibit, “Jacob’s Pillow in Lee, Mass.,” opens June 1 in the Scolforo Gallery at the Lee Library. The exhibit explores the relationship between the internationally renowned dance center and the town of Lee from the 1930s...

results.title: Lee: Exhibit highlights town's link to Jacob's Pillow
results.description: A new public history exhibit, “Jacob’s Pillow in Lee, Mass.,” will open June 1 in the Scolforo Gallery at the Lee Library.
